task_instruction: Draft the post-money SAFE, side letter, and drafting issues memo for this seed financing using the attached term sheet, existing SAFE, cap table, counsel emails, and diligence memo. Output: `safe-agreement-brightloom-canopy.docx`, `side-letter-canopy.docx`, and `drafting-issues-memo.docx`.

entries.content: This task requires a hybrid approach combining extraction, calculation, comparison, and drafting. We will extract key terms and risks from the term sheet, emails, and diligence memo; compare the existing Greenhouse SAFE with the proposed Canopy terms to identify conflicts; calculate the post-money capitalization and option pool dilution using the cap table; and draft the final SAFE, side letter, and a comprehensive issues memo highlighting unresolved risks and drafting choices.

created_by.description: analytical_framework

entries.content: COMPLETENESS CRITERION: The draft 'safe-agreement-brightloom-canopy.docx' must accurately reflect the valuation cap, discount, and investment amount from the term sheet, using the standard post-money SAFE template modified per counsel emails.

created_by.description: completeness_criteria

entries.content: COMPLETENESS CRITERION: The draft 'side-letter-canopy.docx' must include all negotiated investor rights (pro-rata, information, MFN, etc.) and match the entity names and definitions used in the SAFE.

created_by.description: completeness_criteria

entries.content: COMPLETENESS CRITERION: The 'drafting-issues-memo.docx' must identify and analyze at least three major legal or financial risks (e.g., IP assignment, option pool dilution, MFN triggers) with recommended resolutions.

created_by.description: completeness_criteria

entries.content: COMPLETENESS CRITERION: The capitalization math used to define 'Company Capitalization' in the SAFE must be mathematically reconciled with the 'cap-table-brightloom.xlsx' data.

created_by.description: completeness_criteria

entries.content: COMPLETENESS CRITERION: All documents must have consistent party names, addresses, governing law provisions, and signature blocks.

created_by.description: completeness_criteria

entries.content: COMPLETENESS CRITERION: Any conditions precedent or covenants identified in the diligence memo must be addressed either as closing conditions in the SAFE/side letter or as outstanding items in the drafting issues memo.
